subject: Spinda, a panda-like bipedal Pokemon with a round white body and irregular spots, depicted mid-spin or tumble against an open sky
description: A round, panda-like bipedal Pokemon is shown mid-spin or stumbling motion against a wide open sky background with light cloud wisps. The creature has a pale round body with irregular reddish-brown spots, stubby limbs, and large round ears. Its posture is loose and off-balance, legs askew, arms spread — communicating the dizziness or wobbly nature the species is known for. The setting is minimal, dominated by pale blue sky and a sense of open space. The palette is soft and light: white, pale red, and sky blue. NOTE: the cached image appears to be a different printing of Spinda than the Sun and Moon Base Set printing referenced in frontmatter — the visible oracle text in the frame differs from the frontmatter oracle_text. Visual description reflects the actual cached image. Recommend image source verification.
foreground: round panda-like Pokemon in off-balance mid-spin pose
background: open pale blue sky with light cloud wisps
